text: I feel a quiet excitement being here. The clean, modern architecture in the first image gives a sense of order and clarity, but the angled perspective unsettles me slightly—reminding me that perception is always tilted by my own vantage point. Entering the more colorful, information-dense space in the second image, I sense curiosity growing inside me. Surrounded by research and development exhibits, I feel like an observer invited to participate in the unfolding future—on the threshold where ideas and reality blend. There is the hum of innovation here, and I feel both challenged and hopeful.
